# Gyeon Quick Detailer - 1000 ml

Price: $24.99

Quantity Discount: 2+ at $22.99 (8% off)

## Available Sizes
- 500 ml - $14.99 ($0.03/ml)
- 1000 ml - $24.99 ($0.02/ml)

## Product Information
- Remove light contamination safely and easily!
- Enhance gloss and slickness
- Safe for use on paint, trim and glass
- Simple spray on wipe off application
- Product Codes: GY-1641, GY-4979

## Product Description
The Gyeon Quick Detailer helps you safely remove light contamination so your car looks it's best between washings! Even after a detail, light dust, fingerprints, and smudges can find their way on to the paint. With Gyeon Quick Detailer you can remove this type of contamination with only a quick wipe. Quick Detailer can be sprayed directly onto paintwork, trim, glass, etc. It is extremely versatile, coating and wax safe, and enhances gloss and slickness of the surface. You can apply this product to dry paint or even as a drying aid to help your drying towel glide across the paint. When you apply the product you'll be thoroughly impressed with the results. If you are looking for a quick and easy way to clean your paint, while enhancing gloss, the Gyeon Quick Detailer is a great choice!

Important: This item cannot be shipped, sold, or used in the state of California. CARB in California claims this item breaks their VOC regulations.

## From The Label

### Product Description
Provides deep gloss and a shiny finish. Stunningly easy to work with.
- Slick finish
- High gloss and depth
- Safe on all surfaces

### Directions
Wash the car with the shampoo of your choice and dry it. Spray directly on the surface and wipe with a Gyeon microfibre of your choice until full gloss. Possible use as a drying aid on wet panels.

## Customer Reviews
100% of customers said that they would buy this item again (Based upon 5 ratings)

Reviewed by Robert H. on 7/8/2022 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
One of the better quick detailers that I've used. Great shine and gloss. I'll most likely buy again, although the price is higher than some similar products so not too great of a value.

Reviewed by Daniel M. on 7/4/2021 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
Yes I would buy this again, but compared to other detailers on the market this is just ok. For the price point and volume it comes with you can buy a better quality spray such as Sonax or Tacc System. This product is more hype than quality so I would suggest doing your research.

Reviewed by Brian C. on 4/26/2021 (DI Verified Purchase) - Would buy again: Yes
Super gloss, slickness, easy to apply no streaking.

# GYEON Q²M Quick Detailer

Brand: Gyeon

## Pricing (CAD)
- 500ml - $20.00 CAD
- 1L - $33.00 CAD
- 4L - $99.00 CAD

3%+ Discount with 3+ of the Same Item

## Variant Barcodes
- 500ml: 8809432674955
- 1L: 8809432674979
- 4L: 8809432674986

## Description
Q²M QuickDetailer is the answer to the needs of detailing enthusiasts searching for the most versatile daily quick-detailing product. It enhances gloss and adds great slickness while removing spots, streaks, or fingerprints. It's completely safe to use on coatings as well as on traditional waxes.

Available Capacities: 400 ML / 1000 ML

## Drying Aid & Topper
Q²M QuickDetailer is the answer to the needs of detailing enthusiasts searching for the most versatile daily quick-detailing product. It enhances gloss and adds great slickness while removing spots, streaks, or fingerprints. It's completely safe to use on coatings as well as on traditional waxes.

## Best Practice and Pro-Tips from Yves Heylen
Quick, easy and effortless gloss enhancement on all painted surfaces of your vehicle. Simply spray on and wipe off. Q²M QuickDetailer will remove streaks & spots and leave a glossy and slick finish. It's by far the easiest way to boost the look of your car in almost no-time.

TIP: Use Q²M QuickDetailer as a drying aid on a wet car. The process will become easier, the finish better and instant gloss will remain for weeks.

Consumption: 40-50ml/car
Gloss: 5/5 stars

## Easy to Use
Q²M QuickDetailer is the easiest product of its kind, making it a child's play to wipe off even when it dries out on the surface. It may be used both on dry and wet paint as it unfolds its potential as a drying aid. The product is a class on its own when it comes to the slickness of the surface. Its versatile character allows the use on all exterior surfaces.

## Uses
- Removes water spots, streaks, and fingerprints.
- When used as a drying aid on a wet vehicle, Quick Detailer adds another layer of lubricity and prevents scratching while drying. It also helps catch any water spots from forming.
- A great product to bring to any car show, it can be used to remove light dust, bug guts, and bird droppings without scratching the paint while adding another layer of gloss.
- For caked-on wax, use the Quick Detailer to soften and remove it.

Did you know: GYEON Quick Detailer was tested by the Forensic Detailing channel and demonstrated one of the highest gloss levels measured by a gloss meter.

## FAQ

Q: What's the difference between GYEON's Ceramic Detailer and Quick Detailer?
A: The solution of Quick Detailer is slipperier and can be used to remove light contaminants like bird droppings on the go without scratching the paint. It can also be used as clay lube. Ceramic Detailer is more durable but should only be used when the paint is clean. Both products can be used on PPF, plastics, windows, wheels, chrome, trims, etc.

Q: Is it streaky?
A: Not at all, Quick Detailer wipes off very easily. It can even be applied under the sun; you just need to work quickly.

Q: How long does it last?
A: 4 to 6 weeks. Quick Detailer is not meant to be used as a standalone product but rather as a topper, gloss booster and maintainer for existing waxes, sealants, and coatings.

Q: Does it fill tiny scratches and swirls?
A: No, it does not. If you prefer something that fills ever so slightly, use GYEON Cure. Cure fills and adds a shade to the paint, giving it a really good appearance.

# Gyeon Q²M Quick Detailer (500ml, 1L & 4L)

Brand: GYEON
Product code: GQD500R
Price: £12.00 (500ml)
Available sizes: 500ml, 1 Litre, 4 Litres
Stock: In Stock

## Instant Gloss & Protection Booster!

Give your car showroom-ready shine in seconds with GYEON Q²M QuickDetailer — the most versatile, user-friendly detailing spray for daily maintenance. Perfect as a quick gloss enhancer, drying aid, or spot cleaner, it delivers 5-star shine, slickness, and protection on all exterior surfaces — including ceramic coatings and traditional waxes.

Whether you're touching up between washes, boosting your coating, or speeding up drying, this streak-free formula makes detailing effortless.

The fastest way to a flawless finish — anytime, anywhere!

## Why Choose GYEON Q²M QuickDetailer?
- Instant 5-Star Gloss – Deepens reflections for a "just waxed" look.
- Dual Wet/Dry Use – Works as a drying aid or traditional detailer.
- Coating & Wax Safe – Enhances (never strips) existing protection.
- Ultra-Slick Finish – Makes surfaces smoother and easier to clean.
- Streak-Free Wipe-Off – Even if it dries, it buffs out effortlessly.

## Features
- All-Exterior Use – Safe for paint, glass, trim, and wheels.
- Water-Spot Defense – Helps prevent water marks during drying.
- Low Consumption – Only 40-50mL per full car.
- Pro-Grade Sizes – Available in 500mL, 1L, and 4L.
- Works on ALL exterior surfaces (paint, trim, glass)
- Perfect for coating maintenance
- Ideal for quick touch-ups before car shows

## Specification
- Coverage: ~40-50mL per full car
- Finish: High-gloss, ultra-slick
- Best Paired With: GYEON Silk Dryer (for streak-free drying) & GYEON Ceramic Coatings (for maintenance boosting)

## How To Use

### As a Drying Aid (Wet Car):
- After washing, mist 2-3 sprays per panel while the car is still wet.
- Dry as usual with a microfiber towel for enhanced gloss & slickness.

### As a Quick Detailer (Dry Car):
- Spray directly onto paint or onto a plush microfiber.
- Wipe gently, then buff for instant shine.

### For Spot Cleaning:
- Spray on fingerprints, bird droppings, or light dust.
- Wipe away with a clean towel.

Pro Tip: For maximum slickness, pair with GYEON Silk Dryer towels. Use weekly to maintain coatings between washes!

# Q²M QUICKDETAILER

Category: Exterior / Maintenance

## Overview
Versatile quick detailer for all exterior surfaces.

Q²M QuickDetailer is a versatile quick detailing product designed for regular exterior maintenance. It enhances gloss and surface slickness while removing light dirt, streaks, water spots and fingerprints. The formula is safe for use on ceramic coatings as well as traditional waxes and sealants.

## Description
Easy, slick and very glossy quick detailer for all exterior surfaces of your vehicle.

Q²M QuickDetailer simplifies day to day maintenance by combining easy cleaning with visual enhancement. It can be used on dry or wet paint and also works as a drying aid, making it suitable for frequent use on all exterior surfaces.

## Key Benefits
- Slick Finish
- High Gloss and Depth
- Suitable on All Surfaces

## Technical Details
Capacities: 500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML
Consumption: 40-50ml/car

## How to Use
1. Spray Q²M QuickDetailer onto the surface or a microfibre towel.
2. Wipe gently to remove light contamination.
3. Flip the towel to buff to a streak free finish.
4. Use on wet paint as a drying aid if desired.
5. Repeat as needed for regular maintenance.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is Q²M QuickDetailer safe for ceramic coatings?
A: Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated surfaces.

Q: Can it be used on wet paint?
A: Yes. It works well as a drying aid.

Q: Does it add protection?
A: It enhances gloss and slickness thanks to its Carnauba formula, but it is not considered a soft protection product.

Q: Is it suitable for daily use?
A: Yes. It is designed for frequent maintenance.

Q: What surfaces can it be used on?
A: All exterior vehicle surfaces.
